nasb.text: This is the account of the heavens and the earth when they were created, in the day that the Lord God made earth and heaven.

esv.text: These are the generations of the heavens and the earth when they were created, in the day that the Lord God made the earth and the heavens.

cnv.text: 這是創造天地的起源：耶和華　神造天地的時候，

ccb.text: 这是有关创造天地的记载。 耶和华上帝创造天地的时候，

csbs.text: 诸天和大地被造的来历是这样的：在耶和华神造大地和诸天的日子，
